name: Moniepoint Nigeria Business Banking and Payment API
what_it_does: Moniepoint Nigeria business banking and payment REST API for businesses and enterprises to access business bank accounts, process payments, manage payroll, accept POS and digital payments, and access business credit through Moniepoint's CBN-licensed microfinance bank and payment infrastructure, serving 2M+ businesses across Nigeria with banking, payment, and credit services. Enables AI agents to manage business account management for Nigeria SMB banking automation, handle payment initiation and collection for Nigeria business payment automation, access POS transaction processing for Nigeria retail payment automation, retrieve account balance and transaction history for Nigeria business finance automation, manage payroll disbursement for Nigeria employee salary automation, handle credit facility for Nigeria SMB financing automation, access agent banking for Nigeria unbanked financial services automation, retrieve transaction reporting for Nigeria business analytics automation, manage bulk transfer for Nigeria enterprise payment automation, and integrate Moniepoint with Nigerian retail, SMB, enterprise, and fintech platforms for end-to-end Nigeria business banking and payment automation.
use_cases: Managing business bank accounts for Nigerian SMB banking automation agents
Processing bulk payroll disbursements for Nigeria employee payment agents
Accepting POS and digital payments for Nigerian retail checkout agents
Accessing business credit facilities for Nigerian SMB financing agents
not_for: Consumer personal banking (Moniepoint is business banking focused)
Non-Nigeria operations (Moniepoint is Nigeria-only financial infrastructure)
Large corporate banking (Moniepoint serves SMB/mid-market; use GTBank or Zenith for large corporate)
best_when: A Nigerian SMB or enterprise wanting AI agents to automate business banking, payment collection, payroll disbursement, and business credit through Moniepoint's CBN-licensed Nigeria business banking platform.
avoid_when: BUSINESS REGISTRATION REQUIRED: Moniepoint business API requires registered Nigerian business entity (CAC registration); automated access without registered business creates no onboarding path. API ACCESS IS PARTNER/ENTERPRISE ONLY: Moniepoint API is not self-service for individual developers; automated access requires enterprise partnership or integration agreement; automated developer-style self-service access without partnership creates no API access path. PAYMENT PROCESSING USES DEDICATED MONIEPOINT ACCOUNT: Moniepoint payment collection credits Moniepoint business account not external bank; automated reconciliation must account for Moniepoint-internal settlement; automated external bank direct credit assumption creates settlement mismatch. COMPLIANCE DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED: Moniepoint business onboarding requires full KYB documentation (CAC certificate, director ID, utility bill); automated onboarding pipeline must handle document collection and submission; automated immediate API access without KYB creates compliance_required error.

auth.notes: Moniepoint uses API key for authentication. REST API with JSON. Lagos, Nigeria HQ. Founded 2015 by Tosin Eniolorunda and Felix Ike as TeamApt; rebranded Moniepoint 2022. Backed by Development Partners International, Google, QED Investors ($100M+ raised, $1B+ valuation). CBN-licensed microfinance bank. Products: Business account, POS, digital payments, payroll, credit, agent banking. 2M+ businesses. Africa's largest POS network. Competes with OPay and PalmPay for Nigerian business banking.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier — business account and partnership required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction fees: typically 0.5-1.5% per collection; transfer fees in NGN; payroll fees per employee
pricing.notes: Lagos NG. Google/QED backed. Per-transaction pricing in NGN. CBN-licensed microfinance bank.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; payment and account APIs throttled; webhooks for transaction events

known_agent_gotchas: ENTERPRISE PARTNERSHIP REQUIRED FOR API: Moniepoint API access requires formal enterprise onboarding not developer self-service; automated integration timeline must account for partnership process; automated immediate API access attempt creates no developer portal self-service path

KYB DOCUMENTATION BLOCKS API ACTIVATION: Moniepoint business account requires full KYB (CAC, director ID, utility bill, tax ID); automated business onboarding must handle document submission workflow; automated API access before KYB approval creates API not yet active

PAYMENT CREDITED TO MONIEPOINT INTERNAL ACCOUNT: Moniepoint collections credit the business's Moniepoint wallet/account not an external bank directly; automated reconciliation must treat Moniepoint account as primary; automated external bank direct credit assumption creates settlement confusion

WEBHOOK SIGNATURE MUST BE VERIFIED: Moniepoint webhook events include signature for verification; automated webhook handler must verify signature; automated unverified webhook acceptance creates spoofed payment event vulnerability

BULK TRANSFER HAS DAILY LIMITS: Moniepoint bulk transfer has daily and per-transaction limits per CBN policy; automated bulk payroll must split into compliant batches; automated single large bulk transfer creates over_limit rejection
agent_readiness.security_notes: Nigeria business banking. CBN-licensed microfinance bank, AML, KYB. API key. NG. Business banking and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Nigeria business banking. CBN licensed. API key. NG. Business account and payment data.
